The file appears to be cut off mid-sentence at the end.

files.notes: This file contains three distinct lesson sections: Theology (Laying on of Hands), Genealogy (Numbering), and Home Ethics and Art (Golden Rule). Each section has clear subject boundaries and lesson numbering. The file also contains advertisements at the end which are part of the Home Ethics and Art section.
